title: Kyiv: Explosions reported
description: Explosions heard in Kyiv. Explosions were reported in Kyiv around 1 a.m. local time, according to a Kyiv Independent journalist on the ground. Ukrainian officials have warned of the threat of a large-scale missile and drone attack on Kyiv overnight.

title: Kharkiv: Evacuation ordered
description: Kharkiv Art Museum in flames after 'cynical' Russian drone attack. The strike caused a major fire at a critical Ukrainian cultural site and injured five people, including a 1-month-old infant, authorities said. The baby has been hospitalized and emergency crews are at work to evacuate exhibits from the museum. Photo: Ukraine's State Emergency Service / Telegram
description_en: Kharkiv Art Museum in flames after 'cynical' Russian drone attack. The strike caused a major fire at a critical Ukrainian cultural site and injured five people, including a 1-month-old infant, authorities said. The baby has been hospitalized and emergency crews are at work to evacuate exhibits from the museum. Photo: Ukraine's State Emergency Service / Telegram
description_uk: Kharkiv Art Museum in flames after 'cynical' Russian drone attack. The strike caused a major fire at a critical Ukrainian cultural site and injured five people, including a 1-month-old infant, authorities said. The baby has been hospitalized and emergency crews are at work to evacuate exhibits from the museum. Photo: Ukraine's State Emergency Service / Telegram

title: Kyiv: 17 missiles + 000 drones
description: Russia fired nearly 2,000 drones at Ukraine in one week, Zelensky says. Overall, Russia fired 1,920 combat drones, 1,790 guided aerial bombs, and 17 missiles of various types over the past week, President Volodymyr Zelensky said.

description: From Ukraine's war zone to loving homes When war approaches, people may be able to pack their lives into a suitcase and flee within hours. Animals, however, cannot. In areas where humans can no longer enter, animals are often the last living beings left behind amid relentless drone attacks and artillery fire, with little chance of survival. As part of the "Finding Home" project, the Kyiv...

title: Trump is 80. Now he is the oldest sitting president in the history of...
title_en: Trump is 80. Now he is the oldest sitting president in the history of...
title_uk: Трампу 80. Зараз він найстарший діючий президент в історії...
description: Trump is 80. Now he is the oldest sitting president in the history of the United States, and if he serves his term to the end, he will leave the White House at the age of 83. However, age and health are one of the main topics of Donna's second term. In recent years, dementia, a stroke, serious problems with the heart and blood vessels, as well as many other diseases have been attributed to him. Let's talk about everything in order:...
description_en: Trump is 80. Now he is the oldest sitting president in the history of the United States, and if he serves his term to the end, he will leave the White House at the age of 83. However, age and health are one of the main topics of Donna's second term. In recent years, dementia, a stroke, serious problems with the heart and blood vessels, as well as many other diseases have been attributed to him. Let's talk about everything in order:...
description_uk: Трампу — 80. Сейчас он является самым возрастным действующим президентом в истории США, а если досидит срок до конца, то покинет Белый дом уже в 83 года Впрочем, возраст и здоровье — одна из главных тем второго срока Донни. За последние годы ему успели приписать деменцию, инсульт, серьезные проблемы с сердцем и сосудами, а также множество других заболеваний. Давайте обо всем по порядку:...

title: Crimea: Drone incoming
description: 91 ENEMY UAVS SHOT DOWN/SUPPRESSED On the night of June 14 (from 18:00 on June 13), the enemy attacked 98 attack UAVs of the Shahed type (including jet ones), Gerbera, Italmas, and imitation drones of the "Parody" type from the directions: Orel, Bryansk, Primorsko-Akhtarsk - Russia, Chauda, Gvardiyske - TOT AR Crimea. The air attack was repulsed by aviation, anti-aircraft missile forces, EW units and unmanned systems,...
